features: ORIGINAL SKY REMOTE: The Sky 120 is suitable for the Sky+ HD digibox.
READY TO USE: The remote includes 2 AA Duracell batteries, an easy to understand manual is also included in the packaging.
CODE CHECKER: The code checker tool makes synchronising to your TV super simple.
SKY120: This top Sky remote is the perfect replacement or spare for your Sky+ HD box and TV.
description: From the manufacturer Sky+ HD Remote Control Original Sky remote control This original Sky+ HD remote is perfect to replace your broken or lost Sky remote. It’s ready to use with Sky+ HD boxes. Access all your favourite Sky HD content at the touch of a button. Program your Sky remote to control your TV With the new code checker you can easily program your Sky remote to control your TV as well. AA batteries included to use your Sky+ HD remote straight out of the box!
